news.title: Palladyne AI Gains After Securing U.S. Army Contracts for Autonomous Drone Technologies
Palladyne AI Wins US Army Contracts for SwarmOS, Gremlin-X Programs
Palladyne AI Awarded U.S. Army Contracts for SwarmOS™ Autonomous Swarm Technology and Gremlin-X™ Mini-Bomber UAV Under Competitive Disruptive Applications Program
